---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.column-page}

# My Projects

A collection of projects that showcase my skills, creativity, and passion for building meaningful solutions.

## Featured Projects

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Screen Time and Eye Strain Analysis

**Description**: End-to-end data science project focused on analyzing digital screen usage patterns and predicting eye strain risk using exploratory data analysis, statistical insights, and machine learning techniques. The project aims to identify key behavioral and lifestyle factors contributing to eye fatigue and provide actionable recommendations for healthier screen habits.

**Technologies**: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, SHAP), Jupyter Notebook, Power BI

**Key Features**:

- Performed dataset overview, data cleaning, and exploratory data analysis to identify trends, distributions, and outliers
- Visualized average daily screen time across different age groups and analyzed eye strain risk based on screen exposure
- Investigated relationships between screen time, sleep patterns, and eye strain indicators through statistical visualizations
- Planning to implement feature engineering techniques to derive custom eye strain risk metrics and behavioral indicators
- Planning to build machine learning models for predicting eye strain risk levels based on user lifestyle and device usage patterns
- Planning to develop interactive dashboards and visual reports for communicating insights and personalized recommendations
- Planning to apply model explainability techniques to identify the most influential factors contributing to eye strain

**Date**: present | **Context**: Personal Project

:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Vendor Performance Data Analytics

**Description**: An end-to-end data analytics project that consolidates multi-source vendor data into actionable business intelligence for performance evaluation and optimization.

**Technologies**: SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy), Power BI

**Key Features**:
- Designed SQL CTEs to consolidate 6+ raw datasets (purchases, sales, pricing, invoices, inventory)
- Performed data cleaning and feature engineering in Python
- Created critical KPIs: Gross Profit, Profit Margin, Stock Turnover, Sales-to-Purchase Ratio
- Conducted EDA with statistical tests (t-tests, distributions, correlations)
- Developed interactive Power BI dashboards for vendor performance visualization

**Date**: October 2025 | **Context**: Personal Project

:::

:::

---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
### ISP Market Share Data Scraping & Analysis

**Description**: Automated data pipeline to extract, process, and visualize ISP market share data, enabling trend analysis and competitive intelligence.

**Technologies**: Python (BeautifulSoup, Requests, pdfplumber), SQL Server, Power BI

**Key Features**:
- Developed Python-based automation pipeline for data extraction
- Used BeautifulSoup and Requests to retrieve published PDF reports
- Extracted and processed tabular data from PDFs using pdfplumber
- Cleaned and stored data in SQL Server
- Built Power BI dashboards to visualize market trends and performance insights

**Date**: February 2025 | **Context**: Office Project at WorldLink Communication Ltd.

:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Blog Recommendation System

**Description**: A web application that recommends blogs to users by combining content-based and collaborative filtering techniques with machine learning.

**Technologies**: Python, Django, Machine Learning, SQL

**Key Features**:
- Implemented content-based and collaborative filtering algorithms
- Handled algorithm design and backend development
- Integrated machine learning models with Django framework
- Enhanced accuracy by combining user interaction data with content similarity measures
- Delivered a functional recommendation engine for improved user engagement

**Date**: August 2024 | **Context**: College Project

:::

:::

---

## Open Source Contributions

I enjoy contributing to open-source and sharing my projects with the community.

- [**Screen Time and Eye Strain Analysis**](https://github.com/prasanshaojha/ScreenTime_and_EyeStrain)
- [**Vendor Performance Data Analytics**](https://github.com/prasanshaojha/vendor-performance-analysis)
- [**ISP Market Share Data Scraping**](https://github.com/prasanshaojha/Scrappingdata)

---

## Want to Discuss a Project?

[Get in Touch →](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
